mano_cua.result_summary: 登录页面无OIDC登录按钮。DOM查询仅1个Sign in按钮，页面HTML不含oidc文本。OIDC功能需要服务端配置外部OIDC提供商，当前环境未配置，无法测试OIDC登录流程和回调URL。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Login page has no OIDC button. DOM query confirms only 1 button (Sign in). innerHTML.includes('oidc') returns false. OIDC requires external provider configuration not available in local dev environment.
